programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Junior and Tani track down the thief who robbed his parents' home; Five-0 investigates the murder of a beloved philanthropist and the theft of his valuable koa tree; Danny moves in with McGarrett.

programme.desc: A tourist helicopter is shot down by a missile; a search for stolen artillery leads to a ghost from McGarrett's past -- Wo Fat; Adam makes a bold decision about his future with Five-0.

programme.title: NOVA
programme.desc: A unique site in southern England preserved rare traces of ancient ice age mammoths and Neanderthals; host David Attenborough.

programme.title: Nature
programme.sub-title: Attenborough and the Jurassic Sea Monster
programme.desc: A team of forensic experts excavate a giant Pliosaur skull, the largest Jurassic predator ever known.

programme.title: Secrets of the Dead
programme.desc: The chance discovery of a jade artifact leads to the unearthing of an ancient city hidden in the mountains of Sichuan.

programme.title: Outback
programme.desc: The Outback comes to life during the dry season -- turtles lay eggs, cattle get ready for rodeos, athletes dive for pearls and a mother to marsupials sets her babies free.

programme.title: Outback
programme.desc: Rain brings much needed relief from the heat to animals and people in the Outback.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Journalists Grace Dent and Amol Rajan are accompanied by experts Catherine Southon and James Braxton; they purchase Winston Churchill's cigar and wind-up tinplate toy rocket.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Fred Rogers helps children learn that while it's fun to pretend, each person is fine just the way he is.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: The Boy Who Cried Comet; Arthur and Los Vecinos
programme.desc: Buster believes that a comet is heading straight for Earth; Arthur learns about a different culture when a Spanish family moves in.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: The team searches for an injured endangered Florida panther spotted off Alligator Alley highway.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: It's an exciting day for Lily and her family when they move into their new house.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.sub-title: Lyla Can't Sleep; Hairdos and Hair Don'ts
programme.desc: Lyla struggles to sleep and tries to figure out what is wrong with her sleep routine; Lyla tries to do her own hairstyle.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: The Sticker Collection; The Baby Stuff Collection
programme.desc: Carl's favorite sour pickle scratch-n-sniff sticker loses its smell; Carl notices that his baby blanket, Knit-Knit, has a hole in it.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel Pretends at the Pool; Chrissie Pretends at the Library
programme.desc: Daniel is frustrated when Juan Carlos doesn't pretend the same way he does; Chrissie gets upset when O plays horse differently than she does.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe learns what privacy signs are and how to use them to communicate to neighbors; Jay gets nervous about getting a haircut.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Rosita and Elmo play Beach ball Bop around Sesame Street, a game where they hit a ball into the air and don't let it touch the ground; Elmo feels angry and yells at Rosita when he hits the ball and accidentally knocks over his block tower.

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: Great Uncle Duper's Super Visit; Claydate With Louisa
programme.desc: The Wombats build a wind chime to help Great Uncle Duper fall asleep; Zeke tries to make Snout out of clay.

programme.title: Donkey Hodie
programme.sub-title: Beach Day; Super Super Duper Sleepover
programme.desc: Duck enjoys "me time" at the beach; the pals like different things at Donkey's sleepover.

programme.title: Rosie's Rules
programme.desc: Rosie, Iggy and Crystal make a movie; Mom finds a photo from the day they got Gatita.

programme.title: Alma's Way
programme.sub-title: Chacho Gets a Bath; Frankie's Four Feet
programme.desc: A dirty Chacho runs away at the park; Alma realizes that Frankie's old sneakers are more valuable than they appear.

programme.title: Cyberchase
programme.desc: The CyberSquad races through a fizzy asteroid belt and solves math patterns to get the CyberStar back from Hacker.

programme.title: History Detectives
programme.desc: A camera may have been used to photograph President Truman; Civil War doll may have been used to smuggle medicine; a 15th-century map shows how Europe colonized Florida.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Journalists Grace Dent and Amol Rajan are accompanied by experts Catherine Southon and James Braxton; they purchase Winston Churchill's cigar and wind-up tinplate toy rocket.

programme.title: A Chef's Life
programme.sub-title: A Food Truck and a Pear Tree
programme.desc: The crew makes a practice run with the new food truck; pear relish.

programme.title: Nature
programme.sub-title: Attenborough and the Jurassic Sea Monster
programme.desc: A team of forensic experts excavate a giant Pliosaur skull, the largest Jurassic predator ever known.

programme.title: NOVA
programme.desc: A unique site in southern England preserved rare traces of ancient ice age mammoths and Neanderthals; host David Attenborough.

programme.title: To the Contrary With Bonnie Erbé
programme.desc: All-female news analysis of issues and policy affecting the U.S.

programme.title: Compass Points From PBS News
programme.desc: Experts analyze prominent international affairs topics and America's role in a shifting world.

programme.title: Washington Week With The Atlantic
programme.desc: Columnist David Ignatius discusses the state of negotiations with Iran, what the future holds for Ukraine and how President Donald Trump views Cuba.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A Hawaiian kou bowl; a Gandhi presentation spinning wheel; an 1888 Joseph Nawahi painting.

programme.title: Margaret: The Rebel Princess
programme.desc: A look at the life of Princess Margaret, whose life and loves reflected the social and sexual revolution that transformed Britain during the 20th century.

programme.title: Margaret: The Rebel Princess
programme.desc: The early married life of Princess Margaret and her husband Anthony Armstrong-Jones in the 1960s, as major social changes take place in Britain.

programme.title: Downton Abbey on Masterpiece
programme.desc: As he grows into his role as heir, Matthew brings out the rivalry between sisters Mary and Edith; servants Thomas and O'Brien scheme against Bates.

programme.title: Austin City Limits
programme.desc: Grammy Award-winning singer-songwriter Brittany Howard showcases new numbers from "What Now" as well as other hits.

programme.desc: As he grows into his role as heir, Matthew brings out the rivalry between sisters Mary and Edith; servants Thomas and O'Brien scheme against Bates.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A group of Ayn Rand-inscribed books; Edward Borein watercolor circa 1930; a 1931 Carnegie hero medal; a visit to Crab Tree Farm.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Exploring the ancestry of actress Sharon Stone and model Chrissy Teigen includes traveling across Europe and Thailand.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: Listen Up!; Arthur's New Old Vacation
programme.desc: Muffy helps Francine deal with the death of her Bubbe; Arthur and Buster try to make the family vacation more exciting.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: The Mobile Unit tries to figure out who broke into Odd Squad's Top-Secret Security Facility to get the mega-computer; The Shadow tries to convince villains worldwide to join her Villain Network.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: Martin and Chris try to rescue a foal who is separated from his mother by a rogue wave.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: The Hunters find a stowaway in their picnic basket, a little furry dog.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.sub-title: The Mystery Puzzle; The Stu Express
programme.desc: Liana and Lyla put together a puzzle with more than 1,000 pieces; Lyla and Luke construct a train using household materials.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: A Wiggle Waggle Worries; The Pine Cone Collection
programme.desc: Sheldon can't wait for Carl to play his favorite beach game; Lotta and her friends search for Lotta's lost blanket.
